lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear. All major mechanical systems are in working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor rust spots. The interior shows signs of regular use, including fading and small stains on the upholstery. All mechanical components are functional.

Drive home today in this reliable and well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition, featuring a clean interior and a smooth ride that you're sure to love. While it shows some light, typical wear from careful use, it has been kept in great shape and is ready for its next adventure!
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows heavy rust on the rocker panels, several large dents, and failing paint throughout. Mechanically, the engine requires a major tune-up and the transmission is currently slipping, making it unreliable for daily use in its current state. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and a sagging headliner. This car is being sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a dedicated project or as a donor for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive work to be roadworthy. The exterior has significant rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with a large dent on the passenger side door. The paint is heavily oxidized on the roof and trunk. Inside, the upholstery is torn in several places, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission slips when shifting into second gear. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a parts car or a major project for someone with mechanical expertise.

Presented in superlative condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, it exhibits a showroom-fresh aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a history of fastidious care, ensuring a seamless and prestigious ownership experience. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example of a modern classic.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty! Honestly, it’s in incredible shape—it looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I've taken such good care of it, and it really shows. It drives like a dream and is ready for your next big adventure. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love with it!

This AP2 chassis S2000 is a superlative example of high-revving precision. Featuring the revered F22C1 inline-four with seamless VTEC transition, the powertrain remains in factory-spec condition with zero fluid seepage. Power is delivered through a crisp, short-throw six-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry is laser-straight, utilizing original double-wishbone components for telepathic turn-in. Finished in a mirror-like factory coat with all original VIN tags present, this specimen offers the tactile mechanical engagement and torsional rigidity of a showroom-fresh unit.
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Non-smoker.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. Garaged since purchase and meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. The undercarriage is equally clean, reflecting its history in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing or wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control sensors, functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive folder of service records from authorized dealerships. This is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence that has been pampered rather than just driven.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits impeccable mechanical integrity and an unblemished aesthetic, reflecting a history of rigorous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Engineered for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection, this motorcar represents the definitive standard for its class.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and maintaining its original factory luster. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this acquisition represents the definitive choice in its category.

Hey everyone! I’m finally parting ways with my absolute pride and joy! This beauty is in truly stunning, showroom-ready condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for a new home, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

Presenting a museum-grade specimen of the legendary E92 platform, powered by the high-revving 4.0L S65 naturally aspirated V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS. This vehicle retains its analog purity with a 6-speed manual gearbox, delivering linear power through a GKN-sourced M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis is impeccably preserved, featuring Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the signature weight-saving carbon fiber roof for a lowered center of gravity. Maintenance is exhaustive and proactive: rod bearings have been replaced with treated shells, and throttle actuators are upgraded with uprated gears. The exterior finish
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved, featuring a flawless exterior finish with no chips or imperfections, complemented by a pristine interior that still carries a factory-fresh feel. Every surface, from the premium upholstery to the high-gloss trim, remains in impeccable state. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a fully documented service history. Always garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, it drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that satisfies even the most discerning eye.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in concours-level condition. Every surface reflects a commitment to meticulous preservation, offering an aesthetic and mechanical profile indistinguishable from its original delivery state. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade asset that satisfies the most exacting standards of excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that defies its age and mirrors its original showroom presentation. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish and an interior preserved in an immaculate state, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically unrivaled, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes absolute quality and uncompromising integrity.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it—no scratches, no weird noises, just pure perfection. It’s been my baby, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. You’re going to love how it looks and drives! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin.

Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, a definitive example of the high-revving S54 platform. This naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a perfectly timed dual-VANOS system, delivering linear power to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis integrity is superlative, with the critical rear subframe reinforcement already performed to ensure structural rigidity. It retains its original suspension geometry with fresh bushings and aluminum
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Offering a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained since day one. This car presents in absolute mint condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like gloss and zero imperfections. It has been strictly garage-kept and protected with a professional ceramic coating. The interior remains in a pristine state—smoke-free, with supple, unmarked leather and all original appointments intact. Every technological feature and safety system functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. It drives tight, smooth, and powerful, offering the exact experience of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer who demands perfection and a collector-grade example.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous preservation and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless paintwork to the pristine interior upholstery, reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically superior, this acquisition represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated driver who demands nothing less than the extraordinary.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This example remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine specimen that reflects meticulous care and uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I'm absolutely thrilled to list this beauty. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it still feels like it just left the dealership! I've babied this car from day one, and it shows—the interior is spotless and it drives like an absolute dream. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. You won't find another one this clean, I promise!

Available is a museum-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L high-revving inline-six. This unit boasts a linear power delivery optimized by high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing and six individual throttle bodies. Power is transmitted through a precise ZF 6-speed manual gearbox to a GKN variable M-differential lock. The chassis integrity is impeccable, with the critical rear subframe reinforcement already completed and documented. Mechanical upkeep is comprehensive, including a recent valve clearance adjustment and proactive rod bearing replacement. Suspension kinematics are preserved via OEM bushings and fresh dampers, maintaining the factory-intended balance. This vehicle represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, free of mechanical flaws or cosmetic degradation.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero scratches. Clean title. Full service history.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, maintained with obsessive care and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine condition with supple, unmarked leather and that distinct new-car aroma. Every mechanical component has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule at authorized dealerships, ensuring a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key collector-grade vehicle with a documented history and zero excuses.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits flawless mechanical integrity and an interior cabin preserved in showroom state. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. An investment-grade acquisition for those who prioritize uncompromising quality.
